pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven properties to target Java 21 instead of Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling for Java 21 or may have bugs with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in newer compiler plugins and does not correctly set the bootstrap classpath for Java 21, potentially causing runtime issues with module system or API changes.
